title: Zombies are Dream
description: A simple resource pack that turns your zombies into Dream.
body:
This resource pack will transform your **zombies** into **Dream**, the well-known YouTuber...
!
[Me and a zombie...](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f85b491fb909388f4894b27611e615b371bb286_0.webp)

![Poor guy...](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd7b1ef4cf9ee6dae0052299593bfe5b21835026_0.webp)


If you have any questions or encounter any issues, contact me at this email address : ZombiesAreDream@gmail.com
